scripts.preinstall: cmd /c "del /q package-lock.json 2>nul & del /q yarn.lock 2>nul & if not defined npm_config_user_agent (echo Use pnpm instead & exit 1) else if not "%npm_config_user_agent:pnpm/=%"=="%npm_config_user_agent%" (exit 0) else (echo Use pnpm instead & exit 1)"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
